diagrams.title: Swing Component Hierarchy (Partial)
diagrams.description: Inheritance hierarchy showing relationship between AWT and Swing components
diagrams.purpose: Shows how Swing components extend AWT foundations while introducing JComponent as base for all lightweight components

diagrams.title: JRootPane Structure
diagrams.description: Layered structure of JRootPane showing the four main components
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates how Swing organizes components hierarchically, with glass pane for event interception and content pane for actual UI

diagrams.title: Swing Paint Chain
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing the order of painting methods called
diagrams.purpose: Shows developers the correct override point (paintComponent) and the complete painting pipeline
